releaseNotes: Two bug fixes: (1) Dashboard 'Today's plan' and 'Coming up' cards now refresh automatically when the device clock crosses midnight while the app is in the background — previously you had to force-close the app to see the new day. (2) Recurring calendar events (especially daily) became invisible on Android once a sync ran, because the backend's expanded /calendar response collided on the master row's primary key inside Room. Backend now accepts expand=false from Android's sync, so client-side expansion (already the single source of truth for every Android read path) takes over cleanly.
